zh.title: 抽象艺术摆件
zh.description: 采用优质青铜材质，手工制作的抽象艺术摆件，适合家居和办公室装饰。

zh.title: 现代简约雕塑
zh.description: 现代简约风格的雕塑作品，采用不锈钢材质，线条流畅，适合现代家居环境。

zh.title: 传统工艺摆件
zh.description: 采用传统工艺制作的摆件，融合了中国传统文化元素，具有收藏价值。

zh.title: 创意艺术雕塑
zh.description: 创意十足的艺术雕塑，采用混合材质，独特的设计风格，为空间增添艺术气息。

en.title: Abstract Art Ornament
en.description: Handmade abstract art ornament made of high-quality bronze, suitable for home and office decoration.

en.title: Modern Minimalist Sculpture
en.description: Modern minimalist style sculpture made of stainless steel, with smooth lines, suitable for modern home environment.

en.title: Traditional Craft Ornament
en.description: Ornament made with traditional craftsmanship, integrating Chinese traditional cultural elements, with collection value.

en.title: Creative Art Sculpture
en.description: Creative art sculpture made of mixed materials, unique design style, adding artistic atmosphere to the space.
